description: Gamified cryptography learning platform — Laravel 13 + Inertia v3 + React 19

nodes.label: Web Routes
nodes.summary: Main route definitions: public, auth+verified, admin groups. Binds all controllers to URL patterns.

nodes.label: Settings Routes
nodes.summary: Profile, security, social account settings routes.

nodes.label: Broadcast Channels
nodes.summary: WebSocket channel authorization for real-time features.

nodes.label: Console Routes
nodes.summary: Artisan command scheduling definitions.

nodes.label: AppServiceProvider
nodes.summary: Registers event listeners (XpAwarded→LogXpAward, XpAwarded→BroadcastLeaderboardUpdate), rate limiters (challenge-submit, quiz-submit, daily-reward, lesson-complete), and feature flags.

nodes.label: FortifyServiceProvider
nodes.summary: Configures Fortify auth: custom email/username authenticator, social account hints, Inertia views for login/register/2FA.

nodes.label: HandleInertiaRequests
nodes.summary: Shares auth user data (level, XP, streak, badges, feature flags, flash) to all Inertia pages. Calls XpService::updateDailyStreak on every request.

nodes.label: CheckAdmin
nodes.summary: Guards admin routes — aborts 403 if user is not admin.

nodes.label: SecurityHeaders
nodes.summary: Adds security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.) to responses.

nodes.label: SetLocale
nodes.summary: Sets app locale from session/cookie, respects IndonesianLocale feature flag.

nodes.label: HandleAppearance
nodes.summary: Handles dark/light mode appearance preference.

nodes.label: DashboardController
nodes.summary: Single-action controller. Uses AdminDashboardBuilder + LearnerDashboardBuilder to render dashboard with analytics, stats, activity, learning path.

nodes.label: CourseController
nodes.summary: Course catalog (index) and detail (show). Loads lessons, tasks, quiz questions, enrollment progress. Uses CacheService.

nodes.label: EnrollmentController
nodes.summary: Handles course enrollment and progress reset.

nodes.label: LessonProgressController
nodes.summary: Marks lessons complete, awards XP via XpService, checks badges via BadgeService.

nodes.label: QuizSubmissionController
nodes.summary: Handles quiz answer submissions, scoring, XP awards for correct answers.

nodes.label: ChallengeController
nodes.summary: Challenge catalog and detail. Uses ChallengeHelperService for availability, AdaptiveQuestionService for time limits, generates quiz sessions.

nodes.label: ChallengeSubmissionController
nodes.summary: Processes challenge answer submissions, calculates scores via ChallengeScoreService, awards XP.

nodes.label: LeaderboardController
nodes.summary: Renders leaderboard with timeframe filtering, pagination, rank computation. Uses LeaderboardService + LevelService.

nodes.label: ProfileController
nodes.summary: Public profile display with badges. Uses ProfilePageData service. Guards private profiles.

nodes.label: CertificateController
nodes.summary: Lists user certificates, shows individual certificate, provides public verification endpoint.

nodes.label: DailyRewardController
nodes.summary: Handles daily login reward claims, streak tracking.

nodes.label: LabController
nodes.summary: Renders lab pages, tracks lab visits for badge criteria.

nodes.label: NoteController
nodes.summary: CRUD for user notes attached to lessons.

nodes.label: NotificationController
nodes.summary: Lists and marks notifications as read.

nodes.label: OnboardingController
nodes.summary: Multi-step onboarding flow: complete or skip.

nodes.label: SearchController
nodes.summary: Global search across courses, challenges, lessons.

nodes.label: LearningPathController
nodes.summary: Renders learning path with course prerequisites and progress.

nodes.label: HealthCheckController
nodes.summary: Simple health check endpoint for monitoring.

nodes.label: SystemStatsController
nodes.summary: Returns system statistics for admin dashboard.

nodes.label: DiscussionController
nodes.summary: Discussion CRUD (currently unused — feature removed from UI).

nodes.label: SocialAuthController
nodes.summary: OAuth redirect/callback via Socialite. Creates/links SocialAccount, uses SocialAvatarService.

nodes.label: Settings\ProfileController
nodes.summary: Profile settings: update name/email/avatar/bio, delete account.

nodes.label: Settings\SecurityController
nodes.summary: Password update and 2FA management.

nodes.label: Settings\SocialAccountController
nodes.summary: Connect/disconnect OAuth social accounts.

nodes.label: AssessmentController
nodes.summary: Starts assessments, renders assessment UI.

nodes.label: AssessmentSubmissionController
nodes.summary: Saves answers, submits assessments for grading via AssessmentGradingService.

nodes.label: Admin\CourseController
nodes.summary: Admin CRUD for courses: create, update, reorder, toggle publish.

nodes.label: Admin\LessonController
nodes.summary: Admin CRUD for lessons within courses.

nodes.label: Admin\TaskController
nodes.summary: Admin CRUD for lesson tasks (video, read, quiz).

nodes.label: Admin\UserController
nodes.summary: Admin user management: list, update roles.

nodes.label: Admin\ChallengeController
nodes.summary: Admin CRUD for challenges.

nodes.label: Admin\ChallengeQuestionController
nodes.summary: Admin CRUD for challenge question banks.

nodes.label: Admin\AssessmentController
nodes.summary: Admin CRUD for course assessments.

nodes.label: Admin\AssessmentQuestionController
nodes.summary: Admin CRUD for assessment questions.

nodes.label: XpService
nodes.summary: Core gamification engine. Awards XP/points with streak multiplier and level bonus. Tracks daily goals, updates streaks. Dispatches XpAwarded event.

nodes.label: BadgeService
nodes.summary: Evaluates 11 badge criteria types against user progress. Awards badges, dispatches BadgeEarned event, invalidates cache.

nodes.label: LeaderboardService
nodes.summary: Computes leaderboard rankings for all-time and timeframe (weekly/monthly). Aggregates challenge scores + lesson completions. Caches 5 min.

nodes.label: LevelService
nodes.summary: Calculates user level from XP using 50 exponential thresholds. Provides bonus multiplier (0.2%/level). Detects level-ups.

nodes.label: ChallengeScoreService
nodes.summary: Kahoot-style time-decay scoring for challenges. Calculates streak bonuses, session totals. Anti-tampering via DB verification.

nodes.label: ChallengeHelperService
nodes.summary: Resolves challenge availability status (before/during/after time window).

nodes.label: AdaptiveQuestionService
nodes.summary: Adjusts challenge time limits based on user ability estimate (IRT-inspired adaptive difficulty).

nodes.label: DailyChallengeService
nodes.summary: Manages daily challenge rotation and selection.

nodes.label: CacheService
nodes.summary: Centralized cache helper with TTL constants (SHORT=1min, MEDIUM=10min, LONG=1hr).

nodes.label: DocumentConverterService
nodes.summary: Converts uploaded documents (PDF/DOCX) to lesson content format.

nodes.label: AssessmentGradingService
nodes.summary: Grades assessment submissions using rubric scoring. Awards XP on pass.

nodes.label: RubricScoringService
nodes.summary: Applies rubric-based scoring to assessment answers (Bloom's taxonomy levels).

nodes.label: MasteryService
nodes.summary: Tracks topic mastery progression across courses and challenges.

nodes.label: MasteryAnalyticsService
nodes.summary: Analytics for mastery data — progress over time, weak areas.

nodes.label: AuditService
nodes.summary: Logs admin actions to audit_logs table.

nodes.label: ExperimentService
nodes.summary: A/B testing via Pennant feature flags (GamificationRewardVariant).

nodes.label: ProfilePageData
nodes.summary: Formats profile data and badges for display.

nodes.label: SocialAvatarService
nodes.summary: Downloads and stores OAuth provider avatars locally.

nodes.label: AdminDashboardBuilder
nodes.summary: Builds admin dashboard data: user counts, course stats, recent activity.

nodes.label: AdminAnalyticsService
nodes.summary: Computes admin analytics: enrollment trends, completion rates, engagement metrics.

nodes.label: LearnerDashboardBuilder
nodes.summary: Builds learner dashboard: enrolled courses, progress, streaks, recent activity, learning path.

nodes.label: LearnerStatsAggregator
nodes.summary: Aggregates learner statistics: courses completed, lessons done, challenges solved.

nodes.label: AnalyticsBuilder
nodes.summary: Builds analytics charts data for dashboard.

nodes.label: LearningPathBuilder
nodes.summary: Builds learning path visualization with prerequisites and progress.

nodes.label: EarningsHistoryAggregator
nodes.summary: Aggregates XP/points earnings history for charts.

nodes.label: RecentActivityAggregator
nodes.summary: Aggregates recent user activity (lessons, challenges, badges).

nodes.label: AcademyDataBuilder
nodes.summary: Builds academy overview data for dashboard.

nodes.label: User
nodes.summary: Core user model. Has points, xp, streaks, admin flag. Relations: enrollments, courses, lessonProgress, challengeSubmissions, socialAccounts, badges, labVisits, dailyRewards. Implements MustVerifyEmail, TwoFactorAuthenticatable.

nodes.label: Course
nodes.summary: Course with slug, title, difficulty, category, prerequisites. Relations: lessons, tasks (through), assessment, enrollments, users.

nodes.label: Lesson
nodes.summary: Lesson within course. Has content, position, learning objectives. Relations: course, progress, tasks.

nodes.label: LessonTask
nodes.summary: Task within lesson (video/read/quiz type). Has sort_order, content.

nodes.label: LessonProgress
nodes.summary: Tracks user lesson completion with timestamps.

nodes.label: TaskProgress
nodes.summary: Tracks individual task completion within lessons.

nodes.label: Enrollment
nodes.summary: User-Course enrollment pivot with progress_percentage, enrolled_at, completed_at.

nodes.label: Challenge
nodes.summary: Challenge with time limit, question bank, difficulty. Relations: topics, questions, submissions. Scopes: published, daily.

nodes.label: ChallengeQuestion
nodes.summary: Question in challenge bank with options and correct answer.

nodes.label: ChallengeSubmission
nodes.summary: Records challenge attempt: score, streak_bonus, is_correct, time_taken.

nodes.label: Assessment
nodes.summary: Course final assessment with Bloom's taxonomy level.

nodes.label: AssessmentQuestion
nodes.summary: Question within assessment with rubric criteria.

nodes.label: AssessmentSubmission
nodes.summary: User assessment attempt with total score and pass/fail.

nodes.label: AssessmentAnswer
nodes.summary: Individual answer within assessment submission.

nodes.label: Badge
nodes.summary: Badge definition with criteria_type, criteria_value, tier (bronze/silver/gold/platinum).

nodes.label: Certificate
nodes.summary: Course completion certificate with verification code.

nodes.label: DailyReward
nodes.summary: Daily login reward claim record.

nodes.label: Discussion
nodes.summary: Discussion thread (feature currently unused in UI).

nodes.label: DiscussionReply
nodes.summary: Reply to discussion thread.

nodes.label: DiscussionUpvote
nodes.summary: Upvote on discussion/reply.

nodes.label: LabVisit
nodes.summary: Records user lab visits for badge criteria.

nodes.label: Note
nodes.summary: User note attached to a lesson.

nodes.label: QuizQuestion
nodes.summary: Quiz question within lesson task with options.

nodes.label: QuizSubmission
nodes.summary: Quiz answer submission with score and retry tracking.

nodes.label: SocialAccount
nodes.summary: OAuth provider account linked to user (GitHub, Google, etc.).

nodes.label: Topic
nodes.summary: Cryptography topic (Caesar, RSA, etc.) linked to challenges.

nodes.label: AuditLog
nodes.summary: Admin action audit trail.

nodes.label: XpAwarded
nodes.summary: Dispatched when XP/points awarded. Carries user, xp, points, source. Triggers LogXpAward + BroadcastLeaderboardUpdate.

nodes.label: BadgeEarned
nodes.summary: Dispatched when user earns new badge. Carries user + badge.

nodes.label: ChallengeSolved
nodes.summary: Dispatched when challenge solved correctly.

nodes.label: CourseCompleted
nodes.summary: Dispatched when user completes all lessons in course.

nodes.label: LessonCompleted
nodes.summary: Dispatched when user completes a lesson.

nodes.label: LeaderboardUpdated
nodes.summary: Broadcast event for real-time leaderboard updates via WebSocket.

nodes.label: LogXpAward
nodes.summary: Listens to XpAwarded, logs XP award details.

nodes.label: BroadcastLeaderboardUpdate
nodes.summary: Listens to XpAwarded. If RealtimeLeaderboard flag active, fetches top 3 and dispatches LeaderboardUpdated broadcast.

nodes.label: RealtimeLeaderboard
nodes.summary: Pennant feature flag controlling real-time WebSocket leaderboard updates.

nodes.label: IndonesianLocale
nodes.summary: Pennant feature flag for Indonesian language support.

nodes.label: GamificationRewardVariant
nodes.summary: Pennant feature flag for A/B testing reward amounts.

nodes.label: ConvertLessonVideo
nodes.summary: Queued job to transcode uploaded lesson videos.

nodes.label: ConvertLessonDocument
nodes.summary: Queued job to convert uploaded documents to lesson content.

nodes.label: RotateDailyChallenge
nodes.summary: Scheduled command to rotate daily challenge selection.

nodes.label: DecayInactivePoints
nodes.summary: Scheduled command to decay points for inactive users.

nodes.label: WarnPointDecay
nodes.summary: Sends PointDecayWarning notification before decay.

nodes.label: HashChallengeAnswers
nodes.summary: One-time migration command to hash plaintext challenge answers.

nodes.label: CleanupProcessedVideos
nodes.summary: Removes temporary video files after processing.

nodes.label: MigrateAvatarBlobsToFiles
nodes.summary: One-time migration from BLOB avatars to file storage.

nodes.label: AchievementUnlocked
nodes.summary: Notification sent when badge earned.

nodes.label: CourseCompletedNotification
nodes.summary: Notification sent on course completion.

nodes.label: PointDecayWarning
nodes.summary: Warning notification before point decay.

nodes.label: StreakMilestone
nodes.summary: Notification for streak milestones (7, 30, 100 days).

nodes.label: AssessmentGradedNotification
nodes.summary: Notification when assessment is graded.

nodes.label: CoursePolicy
nodes.summary: Authorization policy for course actions.

nodes.label: ChallengePolicy
nodes.summary: Authorization policy for challenge actions.

nodes.label: AssessmentPolicy
nodes.summary: Authorization policy for assessment actions.

nodes.label: EnrollmentPolicy
nodes.summary: Authorization policy for enrollment actions.

nodes.label: CreateNewUser
nodes.summary: Fortify action: validates and creates new user with default XP/points.

nodes.label: ResetUserPassword
nodes.summary: Fortify action: validates and resets user password.

nodes.label: ExtractsLegacyTasks
nodes.summary: Trait for extracting quiz/assessment data from legacy task format.

nodes.label: FlashesAchievements
nodes.summary: Trait to flash badge/level-up data to session for toast display.

nodes.label: Levels Config
nodes.summary: 50 exponential level thresholds (50x1.12^n). Each level gives 0.2% point bonus. Level 50 requires 12,873 XP.

nodes.label: Rewards Config
nodes.summary: All XP/point constants: course_completion=100xp, perfect_score=50xp, streak bonuses, daily goals, speed awards.

nodes.label: Fortify Config
nodes.summary: Fortify configuration: features enabled (registration, email verification, 2FA, password reset).

nodes.label: Pennant Config
nodes.summary: Feature flag storage configuration (database driver).

nodes.label: Reverb Config
nodes.summary: WebSocket server configuration for real-time features.

nodes.label: Services Config
nodes.summary: Third-party service credentials (GitHub, Google OAuth, Sentry).

nodes.label: App Entry
nodes.summary: Inertia app bootstrap: route-based layout selection, Sentry error boundary, dark mode init, progress bar, toast provider.

nodes.label: AppLayout
nodes.summary: Main app layout wrapper — passes breadcrumbs to AppSidebarLayout.

nodes.label: AuthLayout
nodes.summary: Auth pages layout — centered card with logo.

nodes.label: SettingsLayout
nodes.summary: Settings pages layout — max-width container.

nodes.label: AppSidebarLayout
nodes.summary: Sidebar + main content area + achievement toast + route announcer for accessibility.

nodes.label: AppSidebar
nodes.summary: Navigation sidebar with main nav (Dashboard, Courses, Leaderboard, Labs), admin nav, user menu with level progress, logout.

nodes.label: AchievementToast
nodes.summary: Detects flash data (newBadges, levelUp) and shows staggered toast notifications with tier-colored icons.

nodes.label: CourseTaskPanel
nodes.summary: Course outline sidebar: accordion of lessons/tasks with progress, lock states, assessment section.

nodes.label: Dashboard Page
nodes.summary: Main dashboard: greeting, stats cards, activity charts (Recharts), learning path, recent activity. Uses usePoll + Deferred props.

nodes.label: Courses Index
nodes.summary: Course catalog with filtering (status, category, sort), pagination, enrollment actions. Shared with labs via catalogMode prop.

nodes.label: Course Detail
nodes.summary: Course learning view: lesson navigation, video player (Plyr), reading content, quiz submission, assessment tracking. Complex state machine.

nodes.label: Leaderboard Page
nodes.summary: Leaderboard with top-3 trophy display, data table (@tanstack/react-table), timeframe tabs, search, current user highlight.

nodes.label: Labs Index
nodes.summary: Labs catalog — reuses CoursesIndex with catalogMode='labs'.

nodes.label: Lab Detail
nodes.summary: Interactive crypto lab: client-side simulation engine, format conversion, step-by-step walkthrough, mobile swipe nav.

nodes.label: Certificates Page
nodes.summary: Certificate listing with course info, issue dates, verification links.

nodes.label: Certificate Show
nodes.summary: Individual certificate display with download/share.

nodes.label: Certificate Verify
nodes.summary: Public certificate verification page.

nodes.label: Onboarding Page
nodes.summary: Multi-step onboarding: welcome, experience level, interests. Posts to complete/skip.

nodes.label: Welcome Page
nodes.summary: Landing page: feature modules, milestones, CTA based on auth state.

nodes.label: Profile Page
nodes.summary: User profile: avatar, bio, badges grid, stats. Public/private toggle.

nodes.label: Security Settings
nodes.summary: Password update + 2FA enable/disable with QR code and recovery codes.

nodes.label: Profile Settings
nodes.summary: Edit name, email, avatar, bio, pronouns, visibility.

nodes.label: Appearance Settings
nodes.summary: Dark/light/system theme selection.

nodes.label: Social Accounts Settings
nodes.summary: Connect/disconnect OAuth providers.

nodes.label: Login Page
nodes.summary: Login form with email/username, social login buttons.

nodes.label: Register Page
nodes.summary: Registration form with validation.

nodes.label: 2FA Challenge
nodes.summary: Two-factor authentication code entry.

nodes.label: Verify Email
nodes.summary: Email verification prompt.

nodes.label: Forgot Password
nodes.summary: Password reset request form.

nodes.label: Reset Password
nodes.summary: Password reset form with token.

nodes.label: Learning Path Page
nodes.summary: Visual learning path with course prerequisites and progress.

nodes.label: Admin Courses
nodes.summary: Admin course management: CRUD, reorder, publish toggle.

nodes.label: Admin Tasks
nodes.summary: Admin task management within lessons.

nodes.label: Admin Assessments
nodes.summary: Admin assessment management with questions.

nodes.label: Admin Users
nodes.summary: Admin user management: list, search, role updates.

nodes.label: Error Page
nodes.summary: Generic error page (404, 500, etc.).

nodes.label: Lab Simulations
nodes.summary: Pure client-side crypto simulation engine: Caesar, Vigenere, AES, RSA, SHA, Digital Signature. Format conversion (ASCII/Hex/Binary/Base64).

nodes.label: Utils
nodes.summary: Utility functions: cn() for className merging (clsx + tailwind-merge).

nodes.label: ContentParser
nodes.summary: Parses lesson content (markdown/HTML) for rendering.

nodes.label: useLeaderboardChannel
nodes.summary: Laravel Echo WebSocket hook: subscribes to leaderboard channel, maintains top3 state, supports timeframe filtering.

nodes.label: useFlashToast
nodes.summary: Hook to display flash messages as toast notifications.

nodes.label: useTwoFactorAuth
nodes.summary: Custom hook for 2FA setup flow: enable, QR code, recovery codes, disable.

nodes.label: Vite Config
nodes.summary: Build config: Laravel + Inertia + React + Tailwind v4 + Wayfinder plugins. SSR enabled. Optional React Compiler.

nodes.label: Migrations
nodes.summary: 42 migrations: users, courses, lessons, tasks, challenges, assessments, badges, certificates, daily_rewards, discussions, notes, jobs, social_accounts.

nodes.label: CourseShowPageTest
nodes.summary: Feature test for course detail page rendering and data.

nodes.label: AdminCourseTaskSelectionTest
nodes.summary: Feature test for admin task selection UI.

nodes.label: AdminCourseAssessmentSelectionTest
nodes.summary: Feature test for admin assessment selection UI.

nodes.label: AnalyticsPageTest
nodes.summary: Feature test for analytics/dashboard page.

layers.label: Routing
layers.description: Route definitions mapping URLs to controllers

layers.label: Infrastructure
layers.description: Providers, middleware, jobs, commands, notifications, policies, traits, feature flags

layers.label: Controllers
layers.description: HTTP request handlers — thin, delegate to services

layers.label: Services
layers.description: Business logic layer — gamification, scoring, caching, analytics

layers.label: Models
layers.description: Eloquent models with relationships and scopes

layers.label: Configuration
layers.description: App configuration files (levels, rewards, services, build)

layers.label: Frontend Core
layers.description: App entry, layouts, shared components, hooks, utilities

tour.title: Entry Point
tour.description: Inertia bootstraps here: route-based layout selection, Sentry error boundary, dark mode init, progress bar, toast provider. Every page request flows through this.

tour.title: Route Definitions
tour.description: All URL-to-Controller mappings. Groups: public, auth+verified, admin. Rate limiters applied here.

tour.title: Shared Data Layer
tour.description: Every Inertia response gets auth user data (level, XP, streak, badges, flags). Calls XpService::updateDailyStreak.

tour.title: Dashboard Controller
tour.description: Delegates to AdminDashboardBuilder + LearnerDashboardBuilder. Shows different data for admin vs learner.

tour.title: XP Engine (Core)
tour.description: Heart of gamification. Awards XP with streak multiplier, tracks daily goals, dispatches XpAwarded event. All point calculations flow through here.

tour.title: Level System
tour.description: 50 exponential levels from config. Calculates level from XP, detects level-ups, provides point bonus multiplier (0.2%/level).

tour.title: Badge System
tour.description: Evaluates 11 criteria types against user progress. Awards badges on achievement, dispatches BadgeEarned event.

tour.title: Leaderboard Engine
tour.description: Aggregates challenge scores + lesson completions for rankings. Supports all-time and timeframe (weekly/monthly). Cached 5 min.

tour.title: Event-Driven Flow
tour.description: XpAwarded triggers: LogXpAward (logging) + BroadcastLeaderboardUpdate (real-time via WebSocket if flag active).

tour.title: Course Learning View
tour.description: Most complex frontend page. Video player, reading content, quiz submission, assessment tracking, lesson navigation.

tour.title: Crypto Lab Engine
tour.description: Pure client-side crypto simulations: Caesar, Vigenere, AES, RSA, SHA, Digital Signature. Format conversion between ASCII/Hex/Binary/Base64.

tour.title: Challenge Scoring
tour.description: Kahoot-style time-decay scoring. Anti-tampering via DB verification. Streak bonuses for consecutive correct answers.

tour.title: Real-time WebSocket
tour.description: Laravel Echo subscribes to leaderboard channel. Receives live top-3 updates when RealtimeLeaderboard flag is active.

tour.title: Authentication
tour.description: Fortify handles login (email/username), registration, 2FA, password reset. Custom authenticator checks social accounts.

tour.title: Game Balance
tour.description: 50 exponential thresholds (50x1.12^n). Level 50 = 12,873 XP. Combined with rewards.php, defines entire progression economy.
